subcodes.title: Address at weekly meeting, 15 Rue de Greuze in Paris, 1913-02-14
subcodes.first_line: Whenever the Holy Manifestations of God appear in this world they establish their validity with certain proofs. One of their proofs is the prophecies
subcodes.subjects: @miracles and their interpretation, @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @teachings as spirit of the age, @prophecy and fulfillment, @universal peace; world unity, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals
